validation_result.decision_rationale: CRITICAL FINDING: The proposed transition SPAWN_CODE_REVIEWERS_EFFORT_PLANNING → CREATE_NEXT_INFRASTRUCTURE is NOT ALLOWED by the state machine. Allowed transitions from SPAWN_CODE_REVIEWERS_EFFORT_PLANNING are: [WAITING_FOR_EFFORT_PLANS, ERROR_RECOVERY]. ROOT CAUSE: The PREVIOUS transition was invalid. From ANALYZE_CODE_REVIEWER_PARALLELIZATION, allowed transitions are: [CREATE_NEXT_INFRASTRUCTURE, ERROR_RECOVERY]. The orchestrator incorrectly transitioned to SPAWN_CODE_REVIEWERS_EFFORT_PLANNING when it should have gone to CREATE_NEXT_INFRASTRUCTURE. This is a sequence violation - the orchestrator skipped the mandatory CREATE_NEXT_INFRASTRUCTURE step. SOLUTION: Use ERROR_RECOVERY to restore proper state flow.

invalid_transition.violation: CREATE_NEXT_INFRASTRUCTURE was skipped - should have been ANALYZE_CODE_REVIEWER_PARALLELIZATION → CREATE_NEXT_INFRASTRUCTURE

error_recovery_plan.step_2: Rollback state_history to remove invalid transition (ANALYZE_CODE_REVIEWER_PARALLELIZATION → SPAWN_CODE_REVIEWERS_EFFORT_PLANNING)
error_recovery_plan.step_4: Update state files atomically with correction
error_recovery_plan.step_5: Orchestrator must then transition ANALYZE_CODE_REVIEWER_PARALLELIZATION → CREATE_NEXT_INFRASTRUCTURE (valid transition)

ANALYZE_CODE_REVIEWER_PARALLELIZATION.description: Analyze if Code Reviewers can be spawned in parallel or must execute sequentially

CREATE_NEXT_INFRASTRUCTURE.description: Create effort directories, branches, and metadata from wave plan

SPAWN_CODE_REVIEWERS_EFFORT_PLANNING.description: Spawn Code Reviewers to create effort plans

recommendations.orchestrator_instruction: After ERROR_RECOVERY completes rollback, you must transition from ANALYZE_CODE_REVIEWER_PARALLELIZATION → CREATE_NEXT_INFRASTRUCTURE to create effort infrastructure before attempting to spawn Code Reviewers.
recommendations.r288_compliance: State correction will be marked in state_history with correction flag
recommendations.grading_impact: Minor - orchestrator correctly identified the problem and requested correction, demonstrating self-awareness
